sqlMap.select:
SELECT M.* FROM ( select c.CURR_CD, c.CURR_NM, c.SORT_NO, 'E' as GUBUN ,e.MON1 ,e.MON2 ,e.MON3 ,e.MON4 ,e.MON5 ,e.MON6 ,e.MON7 ,e.MON8 ,e.MON9 ,e.MON10 ,e.MON11 ,e.MON12 from TB_CURRENCY c WITH(NOLOCK) left join TB_EXCHANGE e WITH(NOLOCK) ON c.CURR_CD = e.CURR_CD AND e.GUBUN = 'E' AND e.YEAR = #year# UNION ALL select c.CURR_CD, c.CURR_NM, c.SORT_NO, 'A' as GUBUN ,e.MON1 ,e.MON2 ,e.MON3 ,e.MON4 ,e.MON5 ,e.MON6 ,e.MON7 ,e.MON8 ,e.MON9 ,e.MON10 ,e.MON11 ,e.MON12 from TB_CURRENCY c WITH(NOLOCK) left join TB_EXCHANGE e WITH(NOLOCK) ON c.CURR_CD = e.CURR_CD AND e.GUBUN = 'A' AND e.YEAR = #year# ) M WHERE 1=1
AND CURR_CD = #currCd#
ORDER BY M.SORT_NO, GUBUN DESC
sqlMap.update: MERGE TB_EXCHANGE AS A USING ( SELECT #currCd# as CURR_CD, #gubun# as GUBUN, #year# as YEAR, #mon1# as MON1, #mon2# as MON2, #mon3# as MON3, #mon4# as MON4, #mon5# as MON5, #mon6# as MON6, #mon7# as MON7, #mon8# as MON8, #mon9# as MON9, #mon10# as MON10, #mon11# as MON11, #mon12# as MON12 ) AS B ON A.CURR_CD = B.CURR_CD AND A.YEAR = B.YEAR AND A.GUBUN = B.GUBUN WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.MON1 = B.MON1 ,A.MON2 = B.MON2 ,A.MON3 = B.MON3 ,A.MON4 = B.MON4 ,A.MON5 = B.MON5 ,A.MON6 = B.MON6 ,A.MON7 = B.MON7 ,A.MON8 = B.MON8 ,A.MON9 = B.MON9 ,A.MON10 = B.MON10 ,A.MON11 = B.MON11 ,A.MON12 = B.MON12 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CURR_CD, GUBUN, YEAR, MON1, MON2, MON3, MON4, MON5, MON6, MON7, MON8, MON9, MON10, MON11, MON12) VALUES (B.CURR_CD, B.GUBUN, B.YEAR, B.MON1, B.MON2, B.MON3, B.MON4, B.MON5, B.MON6, B.MON7, B.MON8, B.MON9, B.MON10, B.MON11, B.MON12);
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN '01' = #month# THEN MON1 WHEN '02' = #month# THEN MON2 WHEN '03' = #month# THEN MON3 WHEN '04' = #month# THEN MON4 WHEN '05' = #month# THEN MON5 WHEN '06' = #month# THEN MON6 WHEN '07' = #month# THEN MON7 WHEN '08' = #month# THEN MON8 WHEN '09' = #month# THEN MON9 WHEN '10' = #month# THEN MON10 WHEN '11' = #month# THEN MON11 WHEN '12' = #month# THEN MON12 END AS EXC_RATE FROM TB_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #currCd# AND [YEAR] = #year# AND GUBUN IN ('E', 'A') ) M WHERE EXC_RATE != 0

/* selectDayExchangeList */
select CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), REGIST_DT, 23) REGIST_DT , FORMAT(EXCHANGE_RATE , CASE WHEN CURR_CD = 'VND' THEN '##0.0000' ELSE '##0.00' END) AS EXCHANGE_RATE from TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) where CURR_CD = #currCd# and CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), REGIST_DT, 112) LIKE #yyyyMM# + '%' order by REGIST_DT asc
